findings.description: The knowledge file shows `<component name="defaultProcessor" class="nablarch.test.core.http.RequestResponseCookieManager">` (properly opened tag), but the source has `<component name="defaultProcessor" class="nablarch.test.core.http.RequestResponseCookieManager"/>` (self-closing tag, making the source XML malformed with an orphaned `</component>`). The knowledge file silently corrected the source's malformed XML rather than reproducing it faithfully.
findings.source_evidence: Source line: `<component name="defaultProcessor" class="nablarch.test.core.http.RequestResponseCookieManager"/>` followed by `<property name="cookieName" value="JSESSIONID"/>` and `</component>`

findings.description: The PascalCase class `ProjectUpdateForm` appears in the s1 code example but is absent from the s1 hints array.
